schema.name: Ina Silja Bietsch
schema.hairColor: blond (Level 7–10 mit natürlichen Highlights, wellig-straight, schulterlang, germanisch-sächsisch)
schema.eyeColor: blue with golden sunburst effect (central heterochromia: outer blue-gray like a gentle sky, inner golden/amber rings exploding like a sunburst, greenish or golden-yellow depending on light; blueish green eyes featuring golden sunbursts)

additionalProperty.name: bodyType
additionalProperty.value: slim athletic with long legs (86-88 cm), hourglass shape, anime body

additionalProperty.name: familyOrigin
additionalProperty.value: European mix: West Germanic from Cologne and Saxony (mother's side, blond hair), East Prussian with subtle Slavic/Baltic/Finnish influences (paternal grandparents, high cheekbones, slim proportions, Finnish features reflected in second name Silja)
